src.processors package

Submodules

src.processors.calculateScore module

class src.processors.calculateScore.CalculateScore[source]

Bases: Process

run(data)[source]

Calculates the scoring metrics from a specific dataset.

Will calculate precision, recall, and f1 scores.

Parameters:

data (Sample) – Dataset to calculate scores for.

Return type:

Sample

Returns: Dataset with scores added.

src.processors.countPoints module

class src.processors.countPoints.CountPoints[source]

Bases: Process

run(data)[source]

Determines which cell a point is in and how many points are in each cell.

Parameters:

data (Sample) – Sample data to process

Return type:

Sample

Returns: Sample data with updated point counts

src.processors.detectClippingCells module

class src.processors.detectClippingCells.DetectClippingCells[source]

Bases: Process

run(data)[source]

Detects all cells that are cut off by the sample area.

Parameters:

data (Sample) – Dataset to process.

Return type:

Sample

Returns: Processed dataset.

Calculates the scoring metrics from a specific dataset.
